# Introduction {.unnumbered}

## CASA0023: Remotely Sensing Cities and Environments

It's module number 0023 in CASA, and its subject is remotely sensing cities and environments.

## Sam Mize

I'm a student learning about remotely sensing cities and environments in CASA0023. Prior to that I completed a BSME at North Carolina State University in December 2013 and have worked as a mechanical/controls engineer in the US aerospace and other manufacturing industries.
